meaning: n.[律]社团,法人,公司,企业,<美>有限公司,(市,镇的)自治机关,<口>大肚皮
examples: He was a stockholder in a hotel corporation.
The firm has close ties with an American corporation.
The rule applies where a person owns stock in a corporation.
Shares of Charles Schwab Corporation gained 4% on a day when the market sold off 2.5%.
The SNP argues that independence will boost tourism by decreasing corporation tax, which could increase business investment.
